text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's signature racewear has arrived,
so I go looking for her to share the news.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my frantic rush to find her, I drop my trainer
badge somewhere! I look for it, but finding things
is easier said than done in the dark...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you dropped this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe sneaks up on me like a shadow,
my trainer badge in hand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...From the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can see... and hear everything from the
shadows...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Things appear more colorful... more vivid...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all sounds a little vague to me, but I'm sure she
has her methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moving on, I tell Manhattan Cafe about her
racewear. She says she's eager to try it on, so we
arrange to meet up at the track.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It feels cool to the touch, like the shade beneath
a tree... and silky, like the dark of night...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It wraps around me like a shadow... Silent and
tenacious...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Very much... With this racewear, I'm sure that—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh my, oh my! So that's what your racewear looks like. Care to join for me some experimental partner running?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...There's no telling where you'll appear from
next, is there?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come now, no need to eye me so suspiciously.
Are you not curious too? To see how racewear
can affect one's running?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well... I wonder.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But I wouldn't mind running with you... I wanted
to try something anyway...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, is it okay if I go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, under the brilliant, blue sky, the two start
their race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon breaks off in the lead, but
Manhattan Cafe is in close pursuit. Then, as they
enter the last stretch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe appears to vanish from sight
altogether! It looks almost like an actual shadow
is chasing after Agnes Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, you can't just spring that on me!
What was that last-minute sprint all about?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, you never know... Perhaps I really did
emerge from the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I laugh, but I'm not sure you're even
joking!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The shadows, huh... They say racewear can bring
a sense of calm and euphoria to a runner, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Triggering a supernatural phenomenon puts your
racewear in a league of its own!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'll have to analyze the footage and find
out exactly what happened just now!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What did you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It was like you vanished into thin air.
It was like you vanished into thin air.

Is your signature racewear somehow connected
to the shadows?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just as planned... You see, I concealed
myself in the shadows...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I asked the designer to ensure that my racewear
would allow me to sink into the shadows...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This outfit makes me one with the darkness...
Plus, I can see the world more clearly from the
shadows.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Now, even if a race is held somewhere bright, I
can compete comfortably.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I now have a better understanding of Manhattan
Cafe's connection with the shadows. Perhaps they
are her greatest ally.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... That's right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
As I mentioned... everything is clear to me while
I'm in the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In the light, all I can see of my opponents is their
appearance... but from the shadows, I see
everything... Their spirit, their hopes—everything
they carry with them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This racewear will help me perform better than
ever...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That perspective matches her love of the unseen.
I'm positive she'll be able to make even better use
of her true strength now.
